---
title: " "
pagetitle: "Research · Miquel Sirera"
description-meta: "Publications and venues for Miquel Sirera Perelló."
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-hero">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="ph-label">/ research</div>
    <h1>Papers, <span class="accent">posters, and venues.</span></h1>
    <p class="ph-lede">Most of my work sits at the intersection of AI, distributed systems, and wireless. Here's what's published and where to find it.</p>
  </div>
</header>

<section class="section">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <header class="section-head">
      <div class="section-label">/ publications</div>
      <div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Selected <span class="accent">papers.</span></h2>
      </div>
    </header>

    <div class="papers">
      <article class="paper-row">
        <div class="paper-venue">AISTATS 2025</div>
        <div class="paper-content">
          <h3 class="paper-title">Neural Point Processes for Pixel-wise Regression</h3>
          <p class="paper-authors">Chengzhi Shi, Gözde Özcan, <em>Miquel Sirera Perelló</em>, Stratis Ioannidis</p>
        </div>
        <div class="paper-actions">
          <a class="paper-link" href="./research/NPP.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">PDF ↗</a>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="paper-row">
        <div class="paper-venue">IEEE MILCOM 2024</div>
        <div class="paper-content">
          <h3 class="paper-title">JARVIS: Disjoint Large Language Models on Radio VLANs for Intelligent Services</h3>
          <p class="paper-authors"><em>Miquel Sirera Perelló</em>, Joshua Groen, Wan Liu, Stratis Ioannidis, Kaushik Chowdhury</p>
        </div>
        <div class="paper-actions">
          <a class="paper-link" href="./research/JARVIS.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">PDF ↗</a>
          <a class="paper-link" href="./research/Poster_JARVIS.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Poster ↗</a>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="paper-row">
        <div class="paper-venue">IEEE INFOCOM 2024</div>
        <div class="paper-content">
          <h3 class="paper-title">T-PRIME: Transformer-based Protocol Identification for Machine-learning at the Edge</h3>
          <p class="paper-authors">Mauro Belgiovine, Joshua Groen, <em>Miquel Sirera Perelló</em>, Chinenye Tassie, Sage Trudeau, Stratis Ioannidis, Kaushik Chowdhury</p>
        </div>
        <div class="paper-actions">
          <a class="paper-link" href="./research/T-PRIME.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">PDF ↗</a>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="paper-row">
        <div class="paper-venue">ICNC 2024</div>
        <div class="paper-content">
          <h3 class="paper-title">MEGATRON: Machine Learning in 5G with Analysis of Traffic in Open Radio Access Networks</h3>
          <p class="paper-authors">Mauro Belgiovine, Jerry Gu, Joshua Groen, <em>Miquel Sirera Perelló</em>, Utku Demir, Kaushik Chowdhury</p>
        </div>
        <div class="paper-actions">
          <a class="paper-link" href="./research/MEGATRON.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">PDF ↗</a>
        </div>
      </article>

      <article class="paper-row">
        <div class="paper-venue">BSc Thesis · 2023</div>
        <div class="paper-content">
          <h3 class="paper-title">Deep Learning for Wireless Communications</h3>
          <p class="paper-authors"><em>Miquel Sirera Perelló</em>, Kaushik Chowdhury, Albert Cabellos-Aparicio</p>
        </div>
        <div class="paper-actions">
          <a class="paper-link" href="./research/TFG.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">PDF ↗</a>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="section" style="border-top: 1px solid var(--border);">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <header class="section-head">
      <div class="section-label">/ on the road</div>
      <div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Conferences <span class="accent">attended.</span></h2>
      </div>
    </header>

    <div class="conf-grid">
      <div class="conf-tile">
        <div class="conf-year">2024</div>
        <h3 class="conf-name">IEEE MILCOM</h3>
        <p class="conf-loc">Washington, DC</p>
        <span class="conf-status">Presented</span>
      </div>
      <div class="conf-tile">
        <div class="conf-year">2025</div>
        <h3 class="conf-name">ICLR</h3>
        <p class="conf-loc">Singapore</p>
        <span class="conf-status">Attended</span>
      </div>
      <div class="conf-tile">
        <div class="conf-year">2025</div>
        <h3 class="conf-name">AISTATS</h3>
        <p class="conf-loc">Phuket, Thailand</p>
        <span class="conf-status">Presented</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="contact-cta">
  <div class="contact-eyebrow">/ Indexes</div>
  <h2>Find me <span class="accent">elsewhere.</span></h2>
  <div class="hero-cta" style="justify-content:center;">
    <a class="btn-pill ghost" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=DF9KcekAAAAJ" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Google Scholar ↗</a>
    <a class="btn-pill ghost" href="https://orcid.org/0009-0005-8840-6746" target="_blank" rel="noopener">ORCID ↗</a>
    <a class="btn-pill ghost" href="https://dblp.org/pid/366/4777.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">DBLP ↗</a>
    <a class="btn-pill ghost" href="https://www.semanticscholar.org/author/Miquel-Sirera/2278836383" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Semantic Scholar ↗</a>
  </div>
</section>
```
